case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JOSE MORAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-17-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 3/13/12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAR-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, JOSE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, JOSE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-01-2012 CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, JOSE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-18-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, JOSE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, JOSE
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL S. MORSE, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY, IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY, IN SUPPORT OF THE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, JOSE $3,430.02 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,720.02, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 14363067) FILED BY ATTORNEY MORSE, MICHAEL S.
